title: We built a "Context Layer" API to feed real-time financial events & social signals into Trading Agents
author: TrendsAGI
selftext:
We recently launched an API at TrendsAGI designed specifically to solve the "Context Window" problem for autonomous trading agents.

Most LLM-based agents struggle to trade on news because scraping X/Reddit/Financial Feeds in real-time is resource-intensive, and raw text often leads to hallucinations. We built a dedicated **Context Layer** that pre-processes this data into structured JSON, ready for RAG pipelines or System Prompts.

**Key Endpoints for Trading Logic:**

* **GET /api/intelligence/crisis-events (The Guardrail):**
   * Use Case: Poll this endpoint to detect active "Kill Switch" events (global PR disasters, market crashes). If the API returns status: active, your agent can automatically pause trading logic to protect capital.
* **WS /ws/finance-live (Low Latency):**
   * Use Case: A WebSocket stream that pushes earnings reports and macro events (NFP, CPI) the millisecond they are released.
* **GET /api/trends (Alpha Discovery):**
   * Use Case: Returns velocity metrics on rising tickers or topics, allowing agents to spot momentum before it peaks.

**Integration Example (Python):**  
We support standard Python clients. Here is how an agent checks for macro triggers:

codePython

    from trendsagi import TrendsAGIClient
    
    client = TrendsAGIClient(api_key="...")
    
    # Check for active crisis events before executing trade
    threats = client.get_crisis_events(status="active")
    
    if threats.events:
        print("CRISIS ACTIVE: Pausing Agent Operations")
        # Execute defensive logic here
    else:
        # Proceed with standard strategy
        pass

We have a **Signal Plan** (low cost) for developers prototyping agents, and we are looking for feedback on our data structure from the algorithmic trading community.

**Docs:** [Docs](https://www.google.com/url?sa=E&q=https%3A%2F%2Ftrendsagi.com%2Fapi-docs)  
**Home:** [TrendsAGI link](https://www.google.com/url?sa=E&q=https%3A%2F%2Ftrendsagi.com)
